title: sasha sloan for the depressed souls

replies.msg:
她的歌詞就像看穿了我的靈魂，為所有抑鬱的人唱着我們心底的說話。聽着她的歌我想起有句金句就是這樣：

「幸福的人用童年治愈一生，不幸的人用一生治愈童年。」

《Older》
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rb_tqxQKSPM&ab_channel=SashaSloanVEVO
I used to shut my door
while my mother screamed in the kitchen
I’d turn the music up
get high and try not to listen
to every little fight


《House with no mirrors》
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xfGyS4xeG3w&ab_channel=SashaSloanVEVO
If I lived in a house with no mirrors
Where the walls didn’t talk back at me
Maybe I’d dream a bit bigger
I’d be louder, I’d be honest
Probably wouldn’t be self-conscious


《Normal》
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PpCs4UwkhH8&ab_channel=SashaSloan
Why do I try to fit in
When I just wanna go home
And I know this isn't like me
I just want people to like me
So keep on playing that song that I don't like
I just wanna feel normal for the night


《High School Me》
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=twvSX08ARLM&ab_channel=SashaSloanVEVO
The only color you wear is black
‘Cause some girl at school said you look fat
The boy you like doesn’t like you back
But it won’t always be like that

I won’t say it all gets better
But fifteen doesn’t last forever

If high school me could see me now
I bet high school me would be so proud she’d find out
The cool kids they ain’t everything the world is so much bigger than her town


《santa's real》
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=COyYItDGsBw&ab_channel=SashaSloanVEVO
I used to be young and naïve
Until I saw things I couldn’t unsee

I wanna live in a world
Where people don’t get hurt
And everybody’s got enough money
Where nobody ever gets sick
Or has to skip a meal
I wanna live in a world
Where things I believed as a kid
Actually exist
And everybody’s good to each other
Where nobody ever gets drunk
And gets behind the wheel
I wanna live in a world where Santa’s real


《version of me》
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pbLWdhqLW8M&list=OLAK5uy_m5HinSDAuxtYzw-wygU7Cr0UdOft9cwoY&index=4&ab_channel=SashaSloanVEVO
Can you love the version of me

That isn't happy all the time?
I get outta my head, get outta my mind
Can't get outta bed sometimes
And when I look at myself as if I might cry
'Cause I got some trauma, some family drama
Just thought I'd warn you

How can I ask you to love me
when I don't even love myself

sasha sloan未紅嗰陣我就已經留意佢
因為佢嘅歌詞真係好貼地
當其他主流歌手唱愛情歌rap女人金錢性毒品
佢就反而講自己唔開心嘅童年成長
Push想多啲人欣賞佢

幫推
Sasha Sloan真係音樂鬼才黎
同LANY合作既歌都好正
正野, older已經loop左成年

quote.msg: 正野, older已經loop左成年

replies.msg:
上年繼續loop依家聽返都唔會覺得厭
依家瘋狂loop normal
聽dancing with your ghost 識佢
is it just me

每次聽dancing with your ghost 都好深陷
上年聽最多次係依首
